file_insights.key_addition: append_event() call after meta.json persist operation to log meta_written event to JSONL audit trail
file_insights.test_coverage: new test write_meta_appends_event_to_jsonl verifies JSONL file creation and event content

patterns_discovered.description: Using let _ = append_event() to suppress errors from audit log writes without blocking main operation
patterns_discovered.rationale: Metadata persistence must succeed even if event logging fails; prevents cascading failures

patterns_discovered.description: Every meta.json write generates a meta_written event appended to logs/events.jsonl
patterns_discovered.rationale: Enables recovery and forensics via event replay without requiring meta.json checksums to always be fresh

patterns_discovered.description: Event logged with only ts, event name, and nulled optional fields (stage, provider, pid, exit_code, from, to)
patterns_discovered.rationale: meta_written events don't need provider/exit_code context; keeps event line compact

gotchas_discovered.issue: If append_event fails after persist succeeds, meta.json change is not logged but already committed to filesystem
gotchas_discovered.impact: Audit log may have gaps; meta.json state can drift from event stream
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Best-effort pattern acceptable because read_meta can rebuild state from meta.json directly; events are enhancement layer only

gotchas_discovered.issue: logs/events.jsonl creation depends on append_event handling directory creation
gotchas_discovered.impact: If logs/ dir doesn't exist, append_event must create it or fail silently
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Test passes, indicating append_event already handles this; verify in append_event implementation

approach_outcome.summary: Subtask completed: write_meta now logs a meta_written event to JSONL after tmp+rename persist operation
approach_outcome.notes: Test verifies both file creation (meta.json and logs/events.jsonl) and event content; one-line JSONL format verified

recommendations.recommendation: Consider instrumenting append_event failures in logs even though they're best-effort; silent drops may hide systematic issues
Add a new_checksum field to meta_written events for easier forensics and recovery verification
Monitor append_event I/O latency at scale; every meta write now triggers JSONL I/O; batch events if needed
Add test case where append_event fails (mock) to verify meta persistence still succeeds
